title: vicia tenuifolia subsp. subalpina
intro: Vicia tenuifolia subsp. subalpina, also known as the slender vetch, is a subspecies of the vetch plant belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia tenuifolia subsp. subalpina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
